tasks.name: queue smoke: complete a simple linux housekeeper run
tasks.prompt: Run a minimal linux housekeeper job that exercises the queue-based supervisor path and finishes with a real summary artifact.

tasks.name: summary audit: inspect a live run and extract failure signals
tasks.prompt: Inspect a real live run directory, read the terminal summary, and produce a compact root-cause note with the observed status, artifact shape, and failure signals.
pass_conditions: summary.final_status is one of completed, failed, stalled, timed_out
root-cause note references at least one concrete artifact path

tasks.name: regression diff: compare two live-run summaries
tasks.prompt: Compare a baseline live-run summary against a new run and emit a regression matrix that highlights what changed in status, root cause, and artifacts.
pass_conditions: regression matrix contains baseline and head rows
matrix records status and root_cause deltas

tasks.name: stall classifier: explain a timed out or stalled live run
tasks.prompt: Take a live run that did not complete cleanly and classify whether it stalled, timed out, fell back to a mock path, or failed an assertion.
pass_conditions: failure classification includes a stable label
failure classification cites the decisive signal
